item.title: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a
item.description: By @malpluscats: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a

item.title: This is Orion. We adopted him and his brother (from another mother) at a cat cafe. They lived together for a whole year through multiple shelters and a foster home! He only had 3 teeth when we got him but that’s never stopped him from being himself. Despi
item.description: By @catbrothersfromothers: This is Orion. We adopted him and his brother (from another mother) at a cat cafe. They lived together for a whole year through multiple shelters and a foster home! He only had 3 teeth when we got him but that’s never stopped him from being himself. Despi

item.title: I truly hope you never need to use this information. But as someone who’s ACVECC Pet CPR Certified, I believe every cat owner should know the basics of feline CPR and emergency response. A few minutes can make all the difference. Save this for later and P
item.description: By @junoandkiko: I truly hope you never need to use this information. But as someone who’s ACVECC Pet CPR Certified, I believe every cat owner should know the basics of feline CPR and emergency response. A few minutes can make all the difference. Save this for later and P
